changelog:
What's new:
- Active servers: English 1, 2, 3
- Improved download speed and fixed errors
- Added option to reduce buffering
- Added secondary subtitle editor
- Added more custom fonts for TV
- Fixed subtitle delay
- Fixed disappearing Upcoming section
- Fixed AniList login on TV
- Fixed manga section order
- Fixed notification and backup systems

Important note: The recent downtime was due to exceeding server limits. Paid servers are urgently needed to ensure stability. Please avoid using adblockers to help support the app. Donations are highly appreciated!
